series_metadata.series_description: The Board receives verification of education and criminal record report results to support application requirements.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: 14 days from the time the electronic file is provided to the board ; Paper: no paper files are retained in the office. all paper transcripts are uploaded to the electronic system. ; Electronic: Retain in licensing and document management system for a period of one year. After that period of time the records may be destroyed., Microform: Erase ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
